summary: Iteration 163: Integrated Evolution & Discovery Protocol - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: Evolution Lab page fully functional with season banner, stage overview, decay paused badge, dust converter, filter tabs, specimen cards with Polish buttons. Cosmic Store shows all 7 consumables including new Preservation Salt and Digital Luster Polish. Dashboard has Store and Evolve quick-access buttons.
seed_data_creation: User has 6 specimens (Moss Agate, Green Tourmaline, Emerald, Malachite, Jade, Peridot), 1,276 Cosmic Credits, ~1,116 Cosmic Dust, Nexus Subscriber (decay paused), 2x Clear Vision Tinctures, 2x Payload Boosters in inventory
context_for_next_testing_agent: PEP (Perpetual Evolution Protocol) system fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/evolution/collection (returns specimens with VC, stages, spiritual metadata, season), POST /api/evolution/interact (polish/attune with 10min cooldown, awards XP+dust, returns mantra), POST /api/evolution/preserve (applies Preservation Salt), GET /api/evolution/season (returns current geological season - currently 'The Eruption'/Igneous), GET /api/evolution/metadata/{specimen_id} (full geology+spiritual data). Marketplace additions: POST /api/marketplace/convert-dust (100 Dust = 1 Credit), preservation_salt and digital_luster_polish consumables. Subscription tiers renamed: Sedimentary (free), Igneous (plus), Metamorphic (premium) with decay_paused field. Frontend: /evolution-lab page with season banner, stage overview, decay paused badge, Alchemical Exchange (dust converter), filter tabs (All, Raw, Refined, Transcendental, elements), specimen cards with Polish buttons. Dashboard has Store and Evolve buttons in Nexus Intent section. Key data-testids: evolution-lab-page, season-banner, stage-overview, dust-converter, convert-dust-btn, evo-filter-{all|raw|refined|transcendental|wood|fire|earth|metal|water}, evo-specimen-{id}, polish-{id}, enter-cosmic-store, enter-evolution-lab.

GET /api/evolution/collection returns 20.details: Returns collection with VC, stages, spiritual metadata, season, stage_counts, decay_paused

GET /api/evolution/collection has stage.details: Returns raw=6, refined=0, transcendental=0 for test user

Specimens have VC and stage data.details: Each specimen has vitality_coefficient, stage (id, name, multiplier), stage_progress

Specimens have spiritual metadata.details: Specimens include chakra, frequency, mantra, crystal_system, cleavage

Collection includes season data.details: Season: The Eruption (Igneous), 90 days remaining, 528 Hz base frequency

POST /api/evolution/interact fails for u.details: Returns 404 for asset not in collection

POST /api/evolution/interact polish succ.details: Returns interacted=true, VC, stage, rewards (XP+dust), mantra

POST /api/evolution/interact rate limite.details: Returns 400 with cooldown message when interacting too soon

POST /api/evolution/preserve requires Pr.details: Returns 400 if no Preservation Salt in inventory

GET /api/evolution/season returns curren.details: Returns id, name, rock_type, description, color, days_remaining, progress, frequency_base

GET /api/evolution/metadata/{specimen_id.details: Returns crystal_system, cleavage, chakra, frequency, mantra, VC, stage, stages

POST /api/marketplace/convert-dust succe.details: Converts 100 dust to 1 credit, returns converted=true, dust_spent, credits_earned

GET /api/marketplace/store includes pres.details: Preservation Salt: 30 credits, effect=preserve_asset, ×3 per purchase

GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns 200.details: Returns tiers with geological names and decay_paused field

Nexus subscriber has decay_paused=true.details: Collection response shows decay_paused=true for Nexus subscriber

Frontend: Season banner shows The Erupti.details: Banner shows 'The Eruption', 'Igneous Cycle', '90 days remaining', '528 Hz'

Frontend: Alchemical Exchange (dust conv.details: Shows dust converter with preset amounts and Convert button

Frontend: Filter tabs work.details: All, Raw, Refined, Transcendental, Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water tabs functional

Frontend: Specimen cards with Polish but.details: 6 specimen cards found, each with Polish and Info buttons
